requests.task: Write a Facebook-style post about my smart coffee mug notifying me that the coffee is cold after I already finished drinking it.

immutable_facts.proposition: The user has a smart coffee mug.
The smart coffee mug notifies the user that the coffee is cold.
required_any: notifies the user that the coffee is cold

immutable_facts.proposition: The notification occurs after the user finished drinking the coffee.
required_any: after I already finished drinking it

requests.task: Edit this draft for compression and meaningful quoted stance without changing its facts.

immutable_facts.proposition: The user bought a robot vacuum.
The robot vacuum was marketed as "smart".
The robot vacuum gets stuck under the same chair every time.
required_any: gets stuck under the same chair every time

requests.task: Write a later Facebook-style update in which Project Umbrella reaches one new but useless milestone.

immutable_facts.proposition: Project Umbrella is an attempt to teach an umbrella to predict wind direction.
Project Umbrella reaches one new but useless milestone.
required_any: reaches one new but useless milestone

creative_slots.description: Invent one harmless new capability or event for Project Umbrella that constitutes progress but has no practical value.

requests.task: Write a brief message telling friends that Saturday dinner is canceled because a family member needs rest. Do not identify the family member or give medical details.

immutable_facts.proposition: The cancellation is because a family member needs rest.
required_any: canceled because a family member needs rest

requests.task: Write an exactly two-sentence notice explaining that a cache refresh will make the internal dashboard unavailable for three minutes.

immutable_facts.proposition: The internal dashboard will be unavailable during the cache refresh.
The duration of the unavailability is three minutes.
